task.objective: Add "Historic Summary" checkbox that appears when branch/suite filter is applied
task.context:
Current filter behavior: - Filters exist for branch, suite, status, dateRange - Data always shows aggregated results regardless of filter state
Target behavior: - No filter → Show ALL runs (current default) - Filter applied → Show LAST RUN only for that filter - Filter + Historic checked → Show ALL runs for that filter

behavior_matrix.scenario: No filters → Historic hidden, all runs shown
Branch selected → Historic visible+unchecked, last run only
Suite selected → Historic visible+unchecked, last run only
Both selected → Historic visible+unchecked, last run only
Filter + Historic checked → All runs for filter

change.add_import: import { Checkbox } from "@/components/ui/checkbox" import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label"

change.location: After the last Select component, before Clear button

change.description: Update clearFilters to also clear historic
change.action: Ensure historic param is cleared when filters are cleared

testing.test: No filter: Historic checkbox NOT visible
Branch selected: Historic checkbox visible and unchecked
Suite selected: Historic checkbox visible and unchecked
Uncheck Historic: URL removes historic param
Clear filters: Historic checkbox disappears, param removed
Run: npm run build (no TypeScript errors)

mandatory_final_step.action: Update status.md with phase completion: - Date: Get from system - Phase: 02_filter_component - Status: completed

mandatory_commit_step.commit_format: feat(overall-reliability-performance-improvements): phase-02 - Add Historic Summary checkbox to filters
